harness.js:191:8-200:10
> exec(`ffmpeg -hide_banner -loglevel quiet -ss ${start} -i ${input} -t ${duration} -c copy ${output}.mp4`, (error, stdout, stderr) => {
  if (error) {
    reject(error);
    return ;
  }
  resolve(`${output}.mp4`);
});
